title: Tenure / Employee experience — Maria Chen lifecycle, ten stages
summary: Ten lifecycle stages built on the 'Tenure / Employee experience' Figma page, covering Maria Chen's full five-year arc from offer signed (Stage 01) through parental leave (Stage 08), the Year 3 Ember moment (Stage 09), and defensible exit (Stage 10). Five-year cost roll-up: $0.233 per Maria against a $90.00 per-EE envelope — 99.7% gross margin. Headline gap: decision-class chip, stage banner, cost panel, Gherkin caption, and lifecycle dots are local primitives; promotion to a shared component library is the next design-system pass.
